sql_array: CREATE TABLE xml_documents (id INT PRIMARY KEY, content XML);
UPDATE xml_documents SET content = '<root><element>Updated Test</element></root>' WHERE id = 1;

SELECT xml_validate_schema(content, 0, 'http://localhost.localdomain/xmlrepository', 'UTF-8', 'x-any', 'Validation=SGML FsaBadWs=IGNORE BuildStandalone=ENABLE MaxErrors=100') FROM xml_documents WHERE id = 1;
